description_long: This is a modern two-story house with a flat roof and a prominent blue trim outlining the roof and balcony edges. The front facade features large glass windows and sliding doors, with a covered porch supported by blue columns and a small overhang. The exterior walls combine light-colored panels and vertical wooden slats, creating a visually appealing contrast. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer and smaller windows, emphasizing privacy. The house sits on a rectangular paved base, with a step-up entry and a small wooden deck at the back. The overall design is clean, geometric, and functional, suitable for contemporary urban neighborhoods.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, blue trim, large windows, and a covered porch. The exterior features a mix of light panels and wood accents, giving it a sleek, urban look.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry with a covered porch, large windows, and blue trim outlining the roof and balcony.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting a small wooden deck, sliding glass doors, and a simpler facade with fewer windows.
description_view_2: Back view with minimal window openings and a plain wall, emphasizing privacy and security.
description_view_3: Side view displaying a tall vertical window, blue trim, and the extension of the porch roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with blue columns, a flat overhang, and large glass doors.
